author: uxiaosu
message:
Add limine bootloader files and build scripts

Add Limine bootloader assets and build tooling: include limine.c and limine.h, multiple EFI and BIOS binary images (BOOTX64/IA32/AA64/LOONGARCH64/RISCV64, limine-bios-*.bin, limine-bios.sys), a generated limine-bios-hdd.h binary array, LICENSE (BSD-style), a Makefile, an install-sh script, and a .gitignore. These files provide the bootloader binaries and a simple build/install flow for packaging or installing Limine into /usr/local/share/limine.

author: uxiaosu
message: Add bootloaders, limine, OVMF and build artifacts

author: uxiaosu
message:
Add bootloaders, limine, OVMF and build artifacts

Adds prebuilt bootloader binaries and tooling (grub2-kernel.iso, limine tree with EFI binaries, limine source and build files, OVMF firmware) and a rust-bootloader-boot artifact set including disk.img and a full target/release build output with dependency fingerprints and compiled artifacts. This large import contains many compiled binaries and build outputs that will significantly increase repository size; consider moving these binaries to a release artifact or cleaning the target/ directory and updating .gitignore to avoid checking in build artifacts.
